name: Rivalry Escalation
description: Determines how an ongoing rivalry between two wrestlers shifts in a given week. Roll d66 and apply the result to both wrestlers involved.

entries.templateText: {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} exchange cold looks backstage but nothing escalates. The tension lingers.
{WRESTLER_1} dismisses {WRESTLER_2} in a post-show interview, calling the rivalry one-sided.
Locker room sources report {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} are deliberately avoiding each other. Nothing to see yet.
{WRESTLER_2} brushes off recent losses to {WRESTLER_1}, insisting the rivalry is far from over.
Management warns both {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} to keep things professional ahead of the next show. Tension eases slightly.
A hallway confrontation between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} is defused by roster members before it escalates.
{WRESTLER_1} questions {WRESTLER_2}'s commitment in a locker room meeting. The tension spills out and fans pick up on it.
{WRESTLER_2} accepts a new challenge from {WRESTLER_1} but insists on stipulations that favor them.
A war of words erupts between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} after their latest encounter. Fans are taking sides.
{WRESTLER_1} makes a point of upstaging {WRESTLER_2}'s segment, drawing heat from the crowd.
{WRESTLER_2} reveals they have been keeping a detailed record of every slight from {WRESTLER_1}. The rivalry deepens.
Management offers both {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} an incentive to settle their differences. Neither accepts.
{WRESTLER_1} publicly tears apart {WRESTLER_2}'s recent excuses in front of the roster. The crowd reaction is strong.
A confrontation at the venue entrance forces security to step between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2}.
{WRESTLER_2} accuses {WRESTLER_1} of backstage politicking. The accusation spreads fast and fans notice.
{WRESTLER_1} interferes in an unrelated match to send a message to {WRESTLER_2}. The crowd reacts strongly.
A physical altercation between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} breaks out during a contract signing. A table is destroyed.
{WRESTLER_1} ambushes {WRESTLER_2} leaving the building. The attack is caught on camera and broadcast everywhere.
{WRESTLER_2} delivers an emotional in-ring promo vowing revenge on {WRESTLER_1}. Crowd reacts with genuine intensity.
{WRESTLER_1} challenges {WRESTLER_2} to settle this in a stipulation match. The challenge is formally accepted.
Both {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} declare they want this rivalry over for good. Fan interest in the feud spikes.
Surprising moment: {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} briefly shake hands after a hard-fought match. Crowd doesn't quite know what to make of it.
{WRESTLER_2} turns the tide on {WRESTLER_1} with a reversal that reshapes the entire rivalry narrative.
A returning veteran aligns with {WRESTLER_2}, tilting the rivalry balance. {WRESTLER_1} is caught completely off guard.
{WRESTLER_1} takes an unexpected loss to {WRESTLER_2}, generating sympathy heat that energizes both sides of the crowd.
{WRESTLER_2} receives unexpected support from several locker room veterans in their feud with {WRESTLER_1}.
The rivalry between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} earns fan recognition as the feud of the month. Both gain momentum.
{WRESTLER_1} makes a public appeal to end things with {WRESTLER_2}. {WRESTLER_2} refuses on the spot, raising the stakes.
{WRESTLER_1} turns on {WRESTLER_2} at the worst possible moment. Fan sentiment shifts sharply.
Management officially books a blow-off match and announces the terms publicly. Fan anticipation reaches new heights.
{WRESTLER_2} exposes a long-hidden secret about {WRESTLER_1} during a live segment. The revelation reshapes the entire feud.
{WRESTLER_1} launches a full assault on {WRESTLER_2} in front of a sold-out arena. Security is overwhelmed.
The rivalry between {WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} reaches a fever pitch. Both vow it ends at the next premium event.
A mid-show betrayal by {WRESTLER_1} leaves {WRESTLER_2} blindsided in front of everyone. Both careers are changed.
{WRESTLER_2}'s allies abandon them mid-feud, leaving {WRESTLER_1} standing tall. The rivalry heat is at its peak.
{WRESTLER_1} and {WRESTLER_2} brawl through the entire arena in an unscheduled confrontation. Both are suspended pending investigation.
